positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon cradling a single glowing botanical element, like a stylized phosphorescent orchid or glowing geometric leaves. The overall style is neo-geometric, blend of mid-century modern illustration and ethereal bioluminescence. Composition should be centered, allowing for clear negative space around the main elements, suitable for a single-color print on apparel. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, and contrasting luminous cyan/lime green accents. Strong, crisp silhouettes and high contrast are essential. Flat graphic style with subtle gradient shading only on the glowing parts. Isolated on a clean white or neutral background for optimal printing. Vector art quality.
